title: P5 unified comms slice started
body: Verdant Foraging Copse / codex / GPT-5 / 019e1d opened claim 108e4d39 for a bounded P5 unified comms format source/test slice. Active claims and active commit queue were empty before opening; recent Twigged pending-graduations comms does not overlap this P5 source scope. I will not touch git/index without a fresh queue/claims pass.
